queries: GE Aerospace GE Q4 2025 earnings results

results.title: GE Aerospace Announces Fourth Quarter 2025 Results
results.snippet: GE Aerospace reported strong Q4 2025 results with total orders of $27.0B up 74%, revenue of $12.7B up 18%, and profit of $2.9B up 24%. The company highlighted adjusted revenue of $11.9B (+20%), operating profit of $2.3B (+14%), and adjusted EPS of $1.57 (+19%).

results.title: GE 4th Quarter 2025 Earnings Report
results.snippet: This investor page provides access to the GE Aerospace Q4 2025 earnings materials including the webcast replay, presentation slides, press release, and 10-K filing dated January 22, 2026.

results.title: GE 4Q 2025 Earnings Release
results.snippet: The official Q4 2025 press release details total orders of $27.0 billion (+74%), GAAP revenue of $12.7 billion (+18%), adjusted revenue of $11.9 billion (+20%), and strong growth in profit and cash flow metrics.

results.title: GE Aerospace (GE) Q4 2025 Earnings Call Highlights
results.snippet: Earnings call highlights show adjusted EPS rose 19% to $1.57 in Q4 with full-year EPS up 38% to $6.37. Free cash flow grew 15% in the quarter and 24% for the full year to $7.7 billion.

results.title: GE 4Q 2025 Earnings Slides
results.snippet: The earnings presentation summarizes double-digit growth in Q4 and full-year 2025 across orders, adjusted revenue, operating profit, free cash flow, and EPS, with detailed financial breakdowns and outlook information.

results.title: Wall Street Is Bullish on GE Aerospace Before Q1 Results
results.snippet: GE Aerospace's backlog has climbed to roughly $190 billion, up nearly $20 billion YoY, providing a solid base for revenue growth as Wall Street remains bullish ahead of Q1 results.

results.title: GE Aerospace Is Down 14% This Month While Its $190 Billion Backlog Keeps Growing
results.snippet: Despite a 14% drop this month, GE Aerospace's $190 billion backlog continues to grow and supports 2026 EPS guidance of $7.10 to $7.40 following strong 2025 results with revenue of $12.72B and doubled free cash flow.

results.title: GE Aerospace Reports Strong Finish to 2025, Projects Growth in 2026
results.snippet: GE Aerospace finished 2025 strongly with a roughly $190 billion backlog and projects further financial expansion in 2026. Management highlighted successful acceleration of output using its Flight Deck operating model.

results.title: GE Aerospace Releases Its 4Q'25, FY25 Results and 2026 Guidance
results.snippet: GE Aerospace reported 21% revenue growth and 38% EPS increase for 2025 while accelerating output to deliver on its $190 billion backlog. The company provided positive 2026 guidance citing its FLIGHT DECK model.

results.title: GE Aerospace Delivered $7.7 Billion in Free Cash Flow Last Year. Here’s Where Shares Could Go in 2026
results.snippet: GE Aerospace closed 2025 with a $190 billion backlog that grew nearly $20 billion in one year along with $7.7 billion in free cash flow. This positions the company for significant upside in 2026 with sold-out engine slots and defense growth.

results.title: GE Aerospace Delivers Record $6.4 EPS: Is the $350 Analyst Target Now Within Reach in 2026?
results.snippet: GE Aerospace enters 2026 with strong operating profit and EPS guidance, as 18 of 20 analysts rate the stock a buy with a mean price target of $352.75.

results.title: GE Aerospace (GE) Stock Forecast and Price Target 2026
results.snippet: According to 20 analysts, the average twelve-month price target for GE Aerospace is $350.88, with a high target of $425.00.

results.title: GE Aerospace Stock Outlook: Is Wall Street Bullish or ...
results.snippet: Analysts forecast GE Aerospace EPS of $7.45 for fiscal 2026. The stock holds a consensus Strong Buy rating from 20 analysts.

results.title: General Electric (GE) Stock Forecast - Public Investing
results.snippet: Analysts give General Electric a Buy consensus rating with a 2026 price target of $344.30.

results.title: Analysts May Be Right About GE Aerospace Stock
results.snippet: Options market sentiment signals suggest GE Aerospace stock could rise above $340 in the next month based on historical performance patterns.
